name: Do I need a lawyer for work forklift injury in Sandy Utah?

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for work forklift injury in Sandy Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes for complex cases/denials; contingency basis.[2][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Not required for basic comp, but strongly recommended for denials, third-party, or max value.** Lawyers handle paperwork, negotiations, liens.[3] Key factors: Free consults common; they negotiate carrier liens post-settlement. Maximize benefits without upfront cost via contingency.[2] DIY risks underpayment.

description: Yes for complex cases/denials; contingency basis.[2][3]
